name: Shoes: The Foundation
description: A carefully edited selection of footwear that covers every scenario: formal to functional, minimal to technical.
introduction: The shoe is the most visible anchor point in any outfit. These selections prioritize longevity, wearability, and the ability to disappear into the background while carrying weight.
philosophy: Shoes should solve problems, not create them. The best shoe is the one you stop thinking about.
curatorNotes: The rule: own one white minimal sneaker, one technical shoe, one boot. Everything else is personal preference.
